calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted; Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung, Esq. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff/Moving party.
Charles Bruce, 415-937-8678 for Defendant/opposing party in Pro Per.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

Plaintiff's Motion for an Order that Matters in Request for Admissions be Admitted is denied. The defendant alleges he has served code complaint responses to the Request for Admissions prior to the date of the within hearing. Pursuant to C.C.P. 2033.280 mandatory monetary sanctions are awarded the plaintiff against the defendant in the amount of $360.00 to be paid within fifteen days of the date of service of this Order with Notice of Entry.

Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details). Copy given to both sides.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
